title: Anomatheca viridis
taxonomy: Anomatheca viridis is classified as a species within the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. This family is part of the order Poales, which includes various types of flowering plants. The class Liliopsida is the next level in the classification, followed by the division Magnoliophyta, which encompasses flowering plants. The kingdom Plantae is the broader category that includes Anomatheca viridis, while the domain Eukaryota is the most general classification. Anomatheca viridis is a monocot, a type of flowering plant with one cotyledon.
